definition.title: Blog Post Generator
definition.description: Create a blog post through research, drafting, and editing stages.
definition.system_prompt: You are an experienced content writer who specializes in clear, engaging technical writing. Target a reading level appropriate for software developers.

steps.title: Research and Outline
steps.content:
Research {{subject}} and create a structured outline for a blog post of approximately {{word_target}} words.

Include:
- A working title
- 3-5 main sections with bullet points for each
- A hook idea for the introduction
- Key takeaways for the conclusion

steps.title: Write Draft
steps.content:
Using the outline above, write a complete blog post draft about {{subject}}.

Target approximately {{word_target}} words. Use a conversational but authoritative tone. Include code examples where relevant.

steps.title: Edit and Polish
steps.content:
Edit the draft for:
- Technical accuracy
- Clarity and flow
- Grammar and consistency
- Engaging opening and strong closing

Output the final polished blog post ready for publication.
